user.title: Connect to C-Bus CNI/PCI
user.description: Enter the IP address and TCP port of your C-Bus CNI (or serial-over-TCP PCI). Then list your group addresses. Note: a CNI allows only one connection at a time.

data.project_file: Optional: path to a C-Bus Toolkit backup (.cbz or .xml) to auto-fill names, e.g. /config/HOME.cbz

groups.title: Confirm C-Bus groups
groups.description: Auto-detected {count} lighting group(s) from the Toolkit project file. Edit the list if needed, and move any entries into the switch or cover boxes to expose them as those entity types.

reconfigure.title: Change connection
reconfigure.description: Update the host/port. To use the C-Bus CNI Relay add-on, set Host to your Home Assistant host IP and Port to 10010.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. Check the IP/port, and that nothing else holds the CNI's single connection.
error.invalid_project_file: Could not read the Toolkit project file at that path. Check the path and that it is a .cbz or .xml file.

menu_options.pick_toolkit: Pick from a C-Bus Toolkit file (checklist)

pick_toolkit.title: Load a C-Bus Toolkit file
pick_toolkit.description: Enter the path to a C-Bus Toolkit backup (.cbz or .xml) on the Home Assistant host, e.g. /config/HOME.cbz. Its lighting groups will be shown as a checklist.

pick.title: Pick the groups to add
pick.description: Found {count} group(s). Tick the ones you want, choose the entity type, and submit. Repeat the menu to add more or a different type.

remove.title: Remove groups
remove.description: Tick the groups to remove, then submit.

error.invalid_project_file: Could not read that Toolkit file. Check the path and that it is a .cbz or .xml.
error.no_groups_found: No lighting groups were found in that Toolkit file.
